source.name: Philadelphia event source registry
source.attribution: Official source pages and configured public event feeds

events.title: Wawa Welcome America 2026
events.description: Philadelphia's signature multi-day free festival of concerts, block parties, and fireworks running through Independence Day on the Benjamin Franklin Parkway.
events.venue: Benjamin Franklin Parkway and venues citywide

events.title: End of Day Parade
events.description: Follow the beat and stomp your feet as we end our day in a playful parade from Food & Family up to Hamilton Hall!

events.title: Red Card Comedy: A Comedy Show With Balls
Kidchella Music Festival
events.description: Free kids' music festival at Smith Memorial Playground, presented as part of Wawa Welcome America, in partnership with Smith Memorial Playground & Playhouse.

events.title: End of Day Parade
events.description: Follow the beat and stomp your feet as we end our day in a playful parade from Food & Family up to Hamilton Hall!

events.title: Manayunk Arts Festival
events.description: The largest outdoor juried arts festival in the Philadelphia area, a two-day closed-street event along Main Street in Manayunk with hundreds of artists, food, and live entertainment.
